_comment: FICTIONAL example profile (Jane Doe). Used as a fallback by the generators when profile/PROFILE.json is missing, and as a reference for the complete shape. Contains NO real person's data. Do not put real data here - put it in PROFILE.json (gitignored).
summary: VP Engineering with 18+ years building SaaS platforms and leading cross-functional R&D organizations from zero to scale; proven record in cloud-native architecture, AI integration, and enterprise team leadership across publicly listed and high-growth SaaS environments.

experience.title: VP Engineering
bullets: Delivered 6 AI proofs-of-concept in 12 months - RAG-powered analytics, agentic automation, and a BI/ML data model - advancing the platform toward cloud-native microservices.
Established company-wide technical standards and an AI tooling playbook adopted across R&D, QA, and delivery teams spanning three product lines.
Mentored Directors of Development and QA plus team leads; introduced an enterprise identity service and a WCAG accessibility framework.
Speaker at the Globex Engineering Summit on AI and platform modernization.

experience.title: Director of Product
bullets: Scaled a telematics SaaS mobile app 8x in user growth and drove a 60% increase in digital conversion.
Managed a portfolio of 9 B2B and B2C products with UX, data, and security stakeholders.
Led an AI-based claims-flow initiative and integrated two external startups into the core workflow.

experience.title: CTO & Head of Product
bullets: Built a SaaS clearance platform from 0 to 9,000 customers with 75% paid conversion across four B2B/B2C products.
Led a 12-person cross-functional team (6 leads) delivering a CI/CD roadmap on cloud microservices with full DevSecOps.
Sourced a $2M investment commitment and integrated ERP, brokers, and payment systems into production.

experience.title: VP R&D & Program Director
bullets: Built a complete R&D curriculum and a student-management system from zero; managed a 2M annual budget; board member.
Recruited and managed technical staff and secured startup project partnerships via business development.

earlier_career: Co-Founder & CTO - Vandelay AI (2013-2015): computer-vision platform shipped to app stores; accelerator alumnus.
Backend Team Lead - Wonka Systems (2011-2013): 6-person international backend team, Scrum Master, payments integration.
volunteering: Mentor | Example Tech Mentorship | 2023-Present - mentored a data-science team that placed 2nd in a national competition.
anti_fabrication_notes: Exact title at Globex SaaS is 'VP Engineering' - do not inflate to 'CTO'.
Frame the Hooli investment as 'sourced $2M investment commitment' - never 'raised $2M'.
Name order is 'Jane Doe' - verify 'Doe Jane' appears 0 times in any generated file.
